title: Building with ADK & A2A: How multi-agent collaboration designs a game
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates multi-agent collaboration using Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Agent2Agent protocol (A2A) to design a game with distinct agents handling architecture, asset rendering, and project management. The demo leverages human-in-the-loop decision making and Cloud Run deployment.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through a multi-agent game design demo built with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and the Agent2Agent protocol (A2A). Distinct agents split the work across architecture, asset rendering, and project management, coordinating through A2A. The demo incorporates human-in-the-loop decision making and deploys on Cloud Run, illustrating how separate specialized agents collaborate on a single build.
